flagMasks.name: LQSF_GENERAL_RECOM
flagMasks.description: Excluding pixels that are deemed unreliable. Flag recommended by QWG.

flagMasks.name: LQSF_OTCI_RECOM
flagMasks.expression: LQSF.CLOUD or LQSF.SNOW_ICE or LQSF.OTCI_FAIL or LQSF.OTCI_CLASS_CLSN
flagMasks.description: Excluding pixels that are deemed unreliable for OTCI. Flag recommended by QWG.

flagMasks.name: LQSF_OGVI_RECOM
flagMasks.description: Excluding pixels that are deemed unreliable for OGVI. Flag recommended by QWG.

flagMasks.name: LQSF_IWV_RECOM
flagMasks.description: Excluding pixels that are deemed unreliable for IWV. Flag recommended by QWG.
